name: Number → Set
description: You can also set the number for the template number from elsewhere in your YAML file with the [`number.set` Action](https://esphome.io/components/number#number-set_action).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the number to set.

config_entries.label: Value
config_entries.description: The value to set the number to.
